title: althaea rugosa
intro: Althaea rugosa, also known as the woolly marshmallow, is a perennial plant species native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. This plant has been utilized in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and soothing effects. The health benefits of althaea rugosa include relieving digestive issues, soothing skin irritations, and providing relief from respiratory problems. Althaea rugosa can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
